headlines.text: Trump calls off Iran strike at last minute, says Gulf leaders asked him to 'hold off' as negotiations continue
Six states hold primaries today in biggest midterm election day of 2026 -- Trump's grip on GOP tested in Kentucky
Iran submits new peace proposal; White House says it falls short, calls it 'not a meaningful improvement'
Sandy Fire in Simi Valley scorches 1,386 acres, forces evacuations, closes schools -- only 5% contained
30-year Treasury yield hits 5.198%, highest in nearly 19 years, rattling bond markets and equity bulls
San Diego mosque shooting kills 3; nation grapples with rising anti-Muslim hate crimes
Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda tops 130 deaths; WHO declares public health emergency of international concern
Stephen Colbert's final week: Jon Stewart visits tonight as Late Show counts down to Thursday's series finale
Trump-backed candidate Ed Gallrein challenges Rep. Thomas Massie in most expensive House primary in history
Gas prices hit $4.53 nationally -- up 44% year-over-year -- as Iran war squeezes global oil supply

breaking.text: Trump says he called off a 'very major attack' on Iran scheduled for today at the request of Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE leaders

stories.hed: Trump Cancels Tuesday Iran Strike, Says Gulf Leaders Begged Him to Chill
stories.dek: Trump revealed he had a massive attack on Iran locked and loaded for today, then called it off because the leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE asked nicely. Iran meanwhile submitted a peace proposal so underwhelming the White House reportedly rolled their eyes so hard it was audible.

stories.hed: Ebola Tops 130 Dead in DRC and Uganda as WHO Declares Global Emergency
stories.dek: The World Health Organization declared the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern. Experts worry USAID cuts may have hampered early response capacity.

stories.hed: Super Tuesday of the Midterms: Six States Vote as Trump Tests Loyalty Machine
stories.dek: Alabama, Georgia, Idaho, Kentucky, Oregon, and Pennsylvania are all holding primaries today in the most consequential midterm election day of 2026. The marquee race is Kentucky, where Trump is spending $32 million to kneecap libertarian-leaning Rep. Thomas Massie.

stories.hed: Sandy Fire Burns 1,386 Acres in Simi Valley, Triggering Evacuations Across Ventura and LA Counties
stories.dek: A fast-moving brush fire sparked by a tractor hitting a rock has scorched nearly 1,400 acres in Simi Valley and is just 5% contained. Schools are closed, evacuation orders are in place, and air quality is deteriorating as far as Malibu and Calabasas.

stories.hed: Report: A Trump-Linked Account Was Buying Oil, Defense, and Gold While Trump Insisted the Iran War Would End 'Soon'
stories.dek: Fortune reports that while Trump publicly promised peace was around the corner, an account tied to his name was quietly loading up on oil, defense, and gold -- the holy trinity of war profiteering. Nothing says 'ceasefire incoming' like a timely commodities haul.

markets.context: Stocks fell for a third straight session as the 30-year Treasury yield hit a 19-year high of 5.198%, with bond market stress and Iran war uncertainty outweighing relief from Trump canceling today's planned Iran strike.

gas.note: Gas is up 44% year-over-year, which is a great way to reconsider your entire life plan every time you pull up to a pump.

popCulture.hed: Stephen Colbert's Final Week: Jon Stewart Visits Tonight, Springsteen Performs Wednesday, Finale Thursday
popCulture.dek: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is airing its last episodes this week before CBS retires the 33-year franchise entirely on May 21. Tonight features Jon Stewart and Steven Spielberg, with a David Byrne performance -- because if you're going out, you might as well go out dancing.

genZ.term: Devil Wears Prada 'and Emily... that's all' trend
genZ.definition: Inspired by the massive box office success of Devil Wears Prada 2 and its viral Miranda Priestly energy, TikTokers are flooding feeds with the 'and Emily... that's all' format -- filming two contrasting shots to deliver subtle, devastating judgment. It's the most passive-aggressive meme of the year and people are absolutely obsessed.
genZ.usage: POV: Trump calling off the Iran strike // POV: Trump's account buying oil futures at the same time -- 'and Emily... that's all.'

tldr: Trump called off a planned Iran strike today at the last minute after Gulf leaders intervened, while Iran's new peace proposal landed with all the enthusiasm of a participation trophy. Back home, six states are voting in the biggest midterm primary day of 2026 and Wall Street is having its worst stretch in months, apparently unimpressed by the diplomatic progress.
